title: Stripe integration
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Stripe integration (DEM-2026-0012)

Executive Summary
This project proposes integrating Stripe to modernize our payment processing infrastructure. This will enhance the checkout experience and expand available payment methods for customers.

Direct Business Value/Impact
Stripe integration will increase conversion rates by offering a seamless and secure transaction process. It will support future growth by enabling access to diverse payment options and global markets.

Potential Risk Mitigation
Due to high risk, we will implement a phased deployment with extensive security auditing and testing. Robust data migration and compliance checks will mitigate financial and data security risks.
capacity_reasoning: High-risk demand requires Senior Architect oversight.
Delivery team has 42% overall available capacity.
Skill gap: Required skills API Integration, Backend Development are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-07.
